generated: engine/backtest_winrate.js — MEDICHAM P(win) vs realized outcomes, held-out games

discrimination.note: does MEDICHAM pick the actual winner more than half the time? (calibration-free signal test)

temperature_calibrated.note: in-sample optimistic ceiling: best the win% can do after re-scaling its overconfidence

recalibrated_heldout.note: Platt recalibration fit on 60% of games, evaluated on the held-out 40%. w1<0 means MEDICHAM's raw signal is inverted; if test_log_loss<0.693 the DE-BIASED model beats a coin on unseen games.

verdict: MEDICHAM does NOT beat coin; does NOT beat Elo (log-loss). Honest verdict either way.
